The Court vacated its tentative ruling and took DEFENDANT PAULINA CONTRERAS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION off calendar in light of the dismissal that was filed on July 21, 2010. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
